title: Paprika
tmdbOverview: When a machine that allows therapists to enter their patient's dreams is stolen, all hell breaks loose. Only a young female therapist can stop it and recover it before damage is done: Paprika.
synopsis: Paprika is a 2006 animation, science fiction and thriller film from Japan. It holds a solid 7.7 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
